prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "The agent retrieved fault record for T-008 instead of T-006 and used incorrect transformer_id in estimate_downtime. Ensure correct asset ID is used throughout the task."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent retrieved fault record for T-008 instead of T-006 and used incorrect transformer_id in estimate_downtime. Ensure correct asset ID is used throughout the task.
